g.text: Thank you for choosing Martins Direct.
We are pleased to welcome you as a valued policyholder. This Welcome Pack contains important
information about your policy, benefits, premiums, waiting periods, claims procedures, and contact details.
Please read this document carefully and keep it in a safe place for future reference.
Please ensure sufficient funds are available on the collection date to avoid missed premium payments and
The following waiting periods apply to your policy:
Please refer to the Terms and Conditions for full details.
Your policy is subject to the terms and conditions issued by the insurer and underwriter.
Premiums must be paid when due.
Claims must be submitted with all required documentation.
Incorrect or incomplete information may affect cover.
Benefits are subject to policy limits and exclusions.
A complete copy of the policy terms and conditions is attached to this Welcome Pack.
In the event of a claim:
Notify Martins Direct or the insurer as soon as possible.
The claim will be assessed by the insurer.
If approved, payment will be processed to the nominated beneficiary.
If you are dissatisfied with any aspect of your policy or service received, you may lodge a complaint.
We aim to resolve complaints promptly and fairly.
If you are not satisfied with the outcome, you may escalate your complaint to the relevant insurer,
underwriter, compliance department, or applicable industry ombud.
I confirm that I have received this Welcome Pack and understand the information provided.
Thank you for choosing Martins Direct.
We appreciate the opportunity to serve you and your family.
